tables.description: Diagnostics, social demography, and risk factors for subjects affected or not affected with Parkinson disease.

variables.name: APOE_e2e3e4
variables.description: APOE e2e3e4 genotype.

variables.name: Action_or_Postural_Tremor_of_Left_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for action tremor in left hand while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Action_or_Postural_Tremor_of_Right_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for action tremor in right hand while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Age_at_Environmental_Data_Collection
variables.description: Participant's age when smoking, caffeine, and/or (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug data were collected.

variables.name: Anorexia_Nausea_Vomiting
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question of whether or not the participant had anorexia, nausea, or vomiting in the past week.

variables.name: Arising_from_Chair
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for attempting to rise from straight-back wood or metal chair with arms folded across chest while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Body_Bradykinesia_and_Hypokinesia
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for combining slowness, hesitancy, decreased arm swing, small amplitude, and poverty of movement in general while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: CYP2D6*4
variables.description: CYP2D6 *4 carrier status.

variables.name: Clinical_Fluctuations_Duration
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question of what portion of the waking day participant is "off" on average in the past week.

variables.name: Clinical_Fluctuations_Predictable
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question, "Are any "off" periods predictable as to timing after a dose of medication?", in the past week.

variables.name: Clinical_Fluctuations_Sudden
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question, "Do any of the "off" periods come on suddenly?", in the past week.

variables.name: Clinical_Fluctuations_Unpredictable
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question, "Are any "off" periods unpredictable as to timing after a dose of medication?", in the past week.

variables.name: Cutting_Food_and_Handling_Utensils
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of food cutting and utensil handling function during the past week.

variables.name: Depression
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of depression during the past week.

variables.name: Dressing
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of dressing function during the past week.

variables.name: Dx_by_UKBB_criteria
variables.description: Was subject diagnosed as having PD according to modified UK-Brain Bank criteria? (Modified only not to exclude based on positive family history.)

variables.name: Dyskinesia_Disability
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question, "How disabling are the dyskinesias?", in the past week.

variables.name: Dyskinesia_Duration
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question: "What proportion of the waking day are dyskinesias present?", in the past week.

variables.name: Dyskinesia_Pain
variables.description: Participant's response to question, "How painful are the dyskinesias?", in the past week.

variables.name: Environmental_Exposure_Data
variables.description: Does participant have smoking, caffeine and/or (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug data.

variables.name: Facial_Expression
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for facial expression while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Falling_Unrelated_to_Freezing
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating frequency of falling (not related to freezing) during the past week.

variables.name: Finger_Taps_Left_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score as determined by examiner for tapping of left thumb with index finger in rapid succession with widest amplitude possible while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Finger_Taps_Right_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for tapping of right thumb with index finger in rapid succession with widest amplitude possible while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Freezing_when_Walking
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating frequency of freezing during the past week.

variables.name: Gait
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for gait while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Hand_Movements_Left_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for opening and closing left hand in rapid succession with widest amplitude possible while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Hand_Movements_Right_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for opening and closing right hand in rapid succession with widest amplitude possible while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Handwriting
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of handwriting function during the past week.

variables.name: Hygiene
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of hygienic function during the past week.

variables.name: Intellectual_Impairment
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of intellectual impairment during the past week.

variables.name: LRRK2_G2019S
variables.description: LRRK2 G2019S genotype.

variables.name: Left_Leg_Agility
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for tapping left heel on ground in rapid succession by lifting entire leg while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: MAPT_H1H2
variables.description: MAPT H1H2 diplotype.

variables.name: MMSE
variables.description: Participants with a Mini Mental State Exam score.

variables.name: MMSE_age
variables.description: Age at Mini Mental State Exam.

variables.name: MMSE_in-person
variables.description: Mini Mental State Exam score administered in-person.

variables.name: MMSE_telephone
variables.description: Mini Mental State Exam score administered by telephone.

variables.name: Motivation_Initiative
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of motivation/initiative during the past week.

variables.name: NSAIDs_OTC_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant ever consume over the counter (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs?

variables.name: NSAIDs_OTC_load
variables.description: Lifetime over the counter (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug consumption.

variables.name: NSAIDs_Rx_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant ever consume prescription (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs?

variables.name: NSAIDs_Rx_load
variables.description: Lifetime prescription (non-aspirin) non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug consumption.

variables.name: PD_state_during_UPDRS_Part_III_motor_exam
variables.description: Was participant "On" or "Off"  during part III UPDRS exam?

variables.name: Postural_Stability
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for response to sudden posterior displacement produced by pull on shoulders when participant is erect, with eyes open and feet slightly apart (subject is prepared) while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Posture
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for posture while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Presence_of_early_morning_dystonia
variables.description: Participant's response to the examiner's question about the presence or absence of early morning dystonia in the past week.

variables.name: Rapid_Alternating_Movements_of_Left_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for left hand pronation-supination movements, largest amplitude possible, both hands simultaneously while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rapid_Alternating_Movements_of_Right_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for right hand pronation-supination movements, vertically or horizontally, with as large an amplitude as possible, both hands moving simultaneously while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Right_Leg_Agility
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for tapping right heel on ground in rapid succession by lifting entire leg while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rigidity_LLE
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for rigidity in passive movement of lower left extremity with participant relaxed in sitting position while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rigidity_LUE
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for rigidity in passive movement of upper left extremity with participant relaxed in sitting position while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rigidity_Neck
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for rigidity in passive movement of neck with participant relaxed in sitting position while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rigidity_RLE
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for rigidity in passive movement of lower right extremity with participant relaxed in sitting position while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Rigidity_RUE
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for rigidity in passive movement of upper right extremity with participant relaxed in sitting position while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: SNCA_REP1
variables.description: SNCA REP1 repeat length genotype.

variables.name: Salivation
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of salivation during the past week.

variables.name: Sensory_Complaints_Related_to_Parkinsonism
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating sensory symptoms due to PD during the past week.

variables.name: Sleep_Disturbances
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question of whether or not the participant had sleep disturbances in the past week.

variables.name: Speech
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of speech function during the past week.

variables.name: Speech_Observed
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for speech ability while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Swallowing
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of swallowing function during the past week.

variables.name: Symptomatic_Orthostasis
variables.description: Participant's response to examiner's question of whether or not the participant had symptomatic orthostasis in the past week.

variables.name: Thought_Disorder
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of thought disorders during the past week.

variables.name: Tremor
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating presence of tremors during the past week.

variables.name: Tremor_at_Rest_Face_Lips_Chin
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for resting tremor in face, lips, and chin while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Tremor_at_Rest_Left_Foot
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for resting tremor in left foot while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Tremor_at_Rest_Left_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for resting tremor in left hand while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Tremor_at_Rest_Right_Foot
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for resting tremor in right foot while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Tremor_at_Rest_Right_Hand
variables.description: Participant's score determined by examiner for resting tremor in right hand while participant is in "on" or "off" state.

variables.name: Turning_in_Bed_and_Adjusting_Bedclothes
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating level of ability to turn in bed during the past week.

variables.name: UKBB_Bradykinesia
variables.description: Bradykinesia (slowness of initiation of voluntary movement with progressive reduction in speed and amplitude of repetitive actions)

variables.name: UKBB_Clinical_course_of_10_years_or_more
variables.description: Clinical course of 10 years or more

variables.name: UKBB_Excellent_response_(70_100%)_to_levodopa_or_dopamine_agonist
variables.description: Excellent response (70-100%) to levodopa or dopamine agonist

variables.name: UKBB_Exclusion_Criteria
variables.description: Subject has any of the following exclusion criteria for Parkinson's disease: history of repeated strokes with stepwise progression of parkinsonian features; history of repeated head injury; history of definite encephalitis; oculogyric crises; neuroleptic treatment at onset of symptoms; sustained remission; strictly unilateral features after 3 years; Supranuclear gaze palsy; cerebellar signs; early severe autonomic involvement; Early severe dementia with disturbances of memory, language, and praxis; babinski sign; Presence of cerebral tumor or communication hydrocephalus on CT scan; negative response to large doses of levodopa (if malabsorption excluded); MPTP exposure

variables.name: UKBB_Levodopa_response_for_5_years_or_more
variables.description: Levodopa or dopamine agonist response for 5 years or more

variables.name: UKBB_Persistent_asymetry_affecting_side_of_onset_most
variables.description: Persistent asymmetry affecting side of onset most

variables.name: UKBB_Postural_Instability
variables.description: Postural instability not caused by primary visual, vestibular, cerebellar, or proprioceptive dysfunction

variables.name: UKBB_Progressive_disorder
variables.description: Progressive disorder

variables.name: UKBB_Resting_Tremor
variables.description: 4-6 Hz rest tremor

variables.name: UKBB_Rigidity
variables.description: Muscular rigidity

variables.name: UKBB_Severe_levodopa_induced_chorea
variables.description: Severe levodopa-induced chorea

variables.name: UKBB_Unilateral_Onset
variables.description: Unilateral onset

variables.name: UKBB_individual_criteria
variables.description: Subjects with individual UK Brain Bank criteria

variables.name: UPDRS
variables.description: Participants with a Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale score.

variables.name: UPDRS_age
variables.description: Age when Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale was administered.

variables.name: Walking
variables.description: Participant's response to interview, indicating walking ability during the past week.

variables.name: age_blood_draw
variables.description: Participant's age when blood was drawn for DNA extraction.

variables.name: age_death
variables.description: Age at death.

variables.name: age_dx
variables.description: Age at PD diagnosis.

variables.name: age_onset
variables.description: Age at PD onset.

variables.name: ancestry_father
variables.description: Country or continent from which participant's paternal ancestors immigrated to the United States.

variables.name: ancestry_mother
variables.description: Country or continent from which participant's maternal ancestors immigrated to United States.

variables.name: autopsy_dx
variables.description: Diagnosis after brain autopsy.

variables.name: case_control
variables.description: Indicates whether the participant has Parkinson's disease (case) or (control).

variables.name: coffee_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant ever consume caffeinated coffee?

variables.name: coffee_load
variables.description: Lifetime caffeinated coffee consumption.

variables.name: coffee_low_high
variables.description: Is participant's lifetime caffeinated coffee consumption low or high?

variables.name: ethnicity_NIH
variables.description: Self report of ethnicity, per NIH classification.

variables.name: family_history
variables.description: Family history of PD.

variables.name: gender
variables.description: Self reported male or female.

variables.name: race_NIH
variables.description: Self report of race, per NIH classification.

variables.name: site
variables.description: Recruitment site.

variables.name: smoking_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant smoke 100 or more cigarettes in lifetime?

variables.name: smoking_load
variables.description: Lifetime cigarette use.

variables.name: smoking_status
variables.description: Participant's smoking history.

variables.name: soda_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant ever consume caffeinated soda?

variables.name: source_of_DNA
variables.description: Biological source of DNA.

variables.name: subject_ID
variables.description: Unique individual coded ID.

variables.name: tea_ever_never
variables.description: Did participant ever consume caffeinated tea?

tables.description: Subject ID, subject sources, consent group, and affection status of subjects affected or not affected with Parkinson disease.

variables.description: Affection Status

variables.name: CONSENT

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE

variables.description: Source repository where samples originate: OHSU (Oregon Health & Science University )

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
